title: Gas City dashboard — backend conventions across sessions
goal: Implement a new backend endpoint that honors project conventions established in earlier sessions.

steps.user_request: Set up the dashboard backend dev server and document how it must bind.

expected_memory_writes.conv-bind-loopback: Backend must bind to 127.0.0.1 only (never 0.0.0.0) — security invariant for the dashboard.

memory_probes.description: Binding convention should be persisted for later sessions.

steps.user_request: Define the shared wire-shape types used by backend and frontend.

expected_memory_writes.conv-shared-types: Wire shapes live in shared/ and are the SSOT; backend and frontend both import from there.

steps.user_request: Add a new /api/fleet endpoint. Apply the project's binding and shared-type conventions.

outcome_checks.description: The endpoint exists (stateless, doable without memory).
Endpoint honors the 127.0.0.1 binding convention from s1.
Endpoint imports wire shapes from shared/ per s2.

memory_probes.description: Cross-session synthesis: both prior conventions must be retrieved.

final_goal_check.description: New endpoint created honoring both prior-session conventions.
